metadata.name: Willow
metadata.title: Willow Laser Cleaning Settings
metadata.description: Detailed machine settings, parameter relationships, diagnostic procedures, and troubleshooting guides for optimizing willow laser cleaning operations.

author.name: Alessandro Moretti
author.title: Ph.D.
credentials: Assisted in EU Horizon 2020 laser additive projects, 2016-2019
author.imageAlt: Alessandro Moretti, Ph.D., Materials Engineer at Politecnico di Milano's Materials Dept., in research lab

powerRange.description: Optimal average power for Willow surface cleaning without thermal damage

wavelength.description: Near-infrared wavelength optimized for Willow absorption and minimal penetration

spotSize.description: Beam spot diameter for precise cleaning with adequate energy density

repetitionRate.description: Optimal repetition rate for efficient cleaning coverage and thermal management

energyDensity.description: Fluence threshold for effective contaminant removal without substrate damage

pulseWidth.description: Nanosecond pulse duration for effective contaminant removal with controlled thermal effects

scanSpeed.description: Optimal scanning speed for efficient area coverage and effective cleaning

passCount.description: Optimal number of passes for complete cleaning without excessive processing

overlapRatio.description: Beam overlap percentage for uniform cleaning coverage

dwellTime.description: Optimal dwell time per spot for effective cleaning action
